indicators.name: Large desk
indicators.rationale: A large desk provides ample space for a computer and other work materials.

indicators.name: Modern lighting
indicators.rationale: The modern lighting fixtures provide good illumination for computer work.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can reduce eye strain and improve mood during work.

indicators.name: Seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The seating arrangement allows for comfortable sitting while working.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work (solo) with ample desk space, good lighting, natural light, and comfortable seating.
